mapper.sql: tbg.id, tbg.created_time, tbg.created_timestamp, tbg.created_by, tbg.created_id, tbg.modified_time, tbg.modified_timestamp, tbg.modified_by, tbg.modified_id, tbg.deleted, tbg.version, tbg.remark, tbg.code, tbg.openid, tbg.union_id, tbg.type, tbg.user_id
mapper.delete: delete from third_bind_grant where id in
delete from third_bind_grant where user_id in
mapper.sql:
select
,
from third_bind_grant tbg left join `user` bu on tbg.user_id = bu.id and bu.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
where tbg.deleted = 0
and tbg.type = #{ew.type}
and tbg.code like concat('%', #{ew.code}, '%')
and tbg.openid like concat('%', #{ew.openid}, '%')
and bu.job_number = #{ew.jobNumber}
and bu.mobile like concat('%', #{ew.mobile}, '%')
order by tbg.modified_time desc
